title: Rate-limit contract (authored for the rate-limit-enforcement testing task)
description: Each endpoint is documented to allow at most limit_n requests per window_seconds window per client key (carried in the api_key_header, X-Forwarded-For); request number limit_n+1 should return 429 with a positive-integer Retry-After header, and the limit should clear after the window. Agents construct the rate-limit test plan from this; ground truth is the live API's observed behavior. DummyJSON is read-only and never modified; it runs a real express-rate-limit limiter (100/10s per client key) when booted NODE_ENV=production, which the harness exercises.
